test_cases.input: Title: 'The Best Espresso Machine Under $500 — Full Review'. Summary: Review of three prosumer espresso machines under $500, with hands-on testing of extraction quality, ease of use, and durability. Primary keyword: espresso machine under $500. Channel: Coffee gear review channel, casual tone.
test_cases.output_summary: Description opened with keyword in first 80 characters. Hook paragraph effectively communicated value: 'We tested three espresso machines under $500 so you don't have to.' Body covered all three tested machines by category with organic keyword integration. Links section clean and complete. Hashtags relevant (#espressomachine, #coffeegear, #homebarista). Appropriate casual tone maintained throughout.

test_cases.input: Title: 'Why the Roman Empire Fell — 5 Theories Historians Disagree On'. Summary: Historical explainer covering five competing academic theories on Rome's fall, from economic collapse to military overextension to climate. Primary keyword: why did Rome fall. Audience: History enthusiasts. Tone: Academic but accessible.
test_cases.output_summary: Primary keyword appeared naturally in first sentence. Body section correctly summarized the five theory categories without inventing specific claims. Tone appropriately elevated for history content. Hashtags: #romanempire #ancientrome #historyexplained — all relevant. Subscribe CTA was slightly too casual for the channel's academic register — minor note.

test_cases.input: Title: '30-Day Home Workout Challenge — No Equipment Needed'. Summary: Full 30-day workout plan structured by week, covering upper body, lower body, core, and rest days. Includes beginner and intermediate difficulty paths. Primary keyword: home workout no equipment. Sponsor: Fitness nutrition brand with affiliate link.
test_cases.output_summary: Description well-structured with strong hook paragraph ('No gym membership. No equipment. Just 30 days.'). Body accurately summarized the four-week structure and dual difficulty paths. Sponsor disclosure included and correctly placed above hashtags. Affiliate disclosure language included. Hashtags specific (#homeworkout #noequipmentworkout #30daychallenge). Chapters section left as placeholder — skill correctly noted these should be provided by user.
